header: How Desiderio turns code into changelogs
description: Four steps from a merged pull request to a published, on-brand release note.

items.title: Merge
items.description: A pull request lands and Desiderio captures it with its labels and author.

items.title: Draft
items.description: AI groups the changes and writes a plain-language summary you can edit.

items.title: Brand
items.description: Apply your colors, logo, and templates so every release looks consistent.

items.title: Publish
items.description: Ship to your page, widget, and email subscribers in a single click.
